description: Fabric data agent for employee knowledge graph exploration.
samplePrompts: Show all assets for EMP014 and average confidence score by format. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Which department has the lowest average document confidence this month?. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
List employees with OneNote assets containing safety-related terms. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Find managers with more than 20 direct and indirect reports. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Show top 10 employees by number of parsed documents. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
What are the most common document categories in R&D?. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Get all emails mentioning procurement delays and owner employees. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Compare confidence scores between PDF and DOCX for Operations. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
List employees who own at least one PPTX and one OneNote document. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Find assets with confidence below 0.70 and suggest reprocessing order. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Show org hierarchy path for EMP077. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Which skills correlate with high confidence parsing results?. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Display all documents mapped to project codenames in Engineering. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Find stale assets not modified in the last 120 days. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Show confidence rollup by section metadata/content/entities. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
List all assets loaded to OneLake but missing Cosmos DB parse results. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Identify employees with cross-department collaboration emails. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Show average confidence trend by week for Finance. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Find top 5 entities extracted from OneNote records. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
Generate briefing summary for manager EMP004 team knowledge assets. Include citations with documentId, cosmosDbRecordId, and storageRef.relativePath.
